title: Methods for Accessing I/O Devices
description: A flowchart illustrating the three primary methods for a CPU to communicate with I/O devices: Programmed I/O, Interrupt-Driven I/O, and Direct Memory Access (DMA).
relationships: CPU issues command to I/O Module (Programmed I/O)
I/O Module sends interrupt signal to CPU (Interrupt-Driven I/O)
DMA Controller manages data transfer directly with Memory (DMA)
